title: Andrew Pruhliere
html:
Yahir's friend; producer of the Pruhliere Proverbs aphorism cluster. Funeral song = Play That Funky Music White Boy.

Key facts

  • Full surname Pruhliere confirmed via 2025 07 18 slideshow death song and the Pruhliere Proverbs note (2025 04 02 pruhliere proverbs).
  • Aphorism producer — a 9-line set of Yahir-attributed Pruhliere lines mixes locker-room humor with political-history references (Treaty of Versailles).
  • Position on violence: "Nothing gets resolved with violence — think of the Treaty of Versailles." — directly counter-punches Yahir's violence as only effective tool line from 2022 03 11 one hundred years of solitude reading log.
  • Implicated in the Mar 2022 dream blowup where dream-Yahir gets in physical altercation with Andrew.

Open questions

  • Where based now?
  • Is "Pruhliere" the same friend referenced as just "Andrew" in 2024 07 04 questions mega notebook?
